name: Slider

variants.name: continuous
variants.description: Any value within the range. Default.

variants.name: discrete
variants.description: Snaps to defined division points. Thumb snaps to nearest division.

variants.name: centered
variants.description: Thumb starts at center. For symmetric ranges (e.g. -100 to 100) representing deviation from baseline.

with_input_field.note: Numeric input synced with slider. When true, set value_label to never.

usage_rules.rule: Use when precision is not important
usage_rules.detail: Sliders are for approximate numeric input. For precise entry, use a numeric Text field.

usage_rules.rule: Avoid extremely large or small ranges
usage_rules.detail: Do not use for ranges like 1–1000 (too large) or 1–3 (too small). Discrete variant not suitable for 2–3 intervals.
The centered variant must have a symmetric range around zero (e.g. -100 to 100). Do not use for non-symmetric ranges.

usage_rules.rule: No value label when input field is shown
usage_rules.detail: When with_input_field=true, set value_label to never. Do not show both.

usage_rules.rule: Align input field widths in stacked sliders
usage_rules.detail: When showing multiple sliders with input fields, all input fields must have the same width.

usage_rules.rule: Only universally recognisable icons for controls
usage_rules.detail: Any icon used in slider controls must be universally recognisable (e.g. reset, show/hide). Avoid ambiguous icons.
If input value exceeds the slider max, it is clamped to max when the field loses focus.

confidence_blockers: If ticket uses centered variant with non-symmetric range, flag as usage_rule violation.
If ticket shows value_label and with_input_field together, flag.
If ticket has a discrete slider with only 2–3 intervals, flag as too few — suggest radio button or segmented control instead.

embedding_text: Slider component. Numeric range input continuous or discrete snap divisions or centered symmetric range. Thumb on track. Optional min max labels value label input field reset button. No value label when input field shown. Centered for symmetric ranges deviation from baseline. Discrete snaps to divisions. Approximate input not precise.
